rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation contracts in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings to existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Maintain valid AADL scope hierarchy when inserting annex blocks
Use appropriate AGREE syntax for stateful equations and branching logic
Ensure all referenced features and variables are visible in the target scope
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
